summary: Failed: The production host appears to be enforcing an auth guard on /tournament, causing the CTA to redirect to /login?next=/tournament. This is likely due to a route protection/middleware misconfiguration on the hosting side, such as the tournaments page being marked private in production, missing/invalid auth session cookies in the deployed environment, or an incorrect environment setup that makes the app think the user is logged out. As a result, clicking the primary tournaments button open…
